jobs.title: Senior Product Manager, Payments
jobs.content:
About the role

Stripe is looking for a Senior Product Manager to join our Payments team.

  • Lead the product roadmap for our core payments infrastructure
  • Partner closely with engineers, designers, and data scientists
  • Define success metrics and drive execution

Requirements

5+ years of product management experience, ideally in fintech or payments.

jobs.title: PM, Risk
jobs.content:
Join Stripe's Risk team as a Product Manager. You will own the product strategy for fraud detection and risk mitigation tools.

  • Define the vision for risk products
  • Work with ML engineers on fraud signals

jobs.title: APM, Infrastructure
jobs.content:
Associate Product Manager role for new graduates. Work on Stripe's core infrastructure products.

  • Rotate across product areas
  • Work directly with engineering teams
